description:
In this episode I show how this management consulting company earned over $7 million in just the past three years selling to various US government agencies. Don't forget to check us out at dodcontract.com and see what we have to offer our students, small business owners and sales professionals inside of the DOD contract academy!

 Check us out at www.dodcontract.com
